summary: Added a regression test asserting that `agt run my-feature` with a fully valid SPEC.md proceeds through the planning and dispatch stages exactly as before. The test verifies exit 0, planning output (`Planned N task(s)`), flow/dispatch selection (`Flow:`), dry-run completion, no spec-gate errors, and that SPEC.md is not mutated. No production code changes were needed — the existing run.mjs gate already lets a complete spec through; this task locks that behavior in.
